{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Cloud Hammer
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Renfei]] cycles [[Cloud Hammer madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Cloud Hammer]] has [[Enforcer techniques]] involving bindings.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
